name: Eggnog Quick Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease the bottom only of a 9x5 inch loaf pan.
3. Beat eggs in a large bowl.
4. Add sugar, eggnog, melted butter or margarine, rum extract, and vanilla; blend well.
5. Sift flour into a measuring cup; level off.
6. Add sifted flour, baking powder, salt, and nutmeg; stir just until dry ingredients are moistened.
7. Pour the batter into the greased pan.
8. Bake for 45 to 50 minutes.
9. Allow cooling in the pan for 10 minutes, then remove from the pan.
10. Cool completely.
Note: Dairy eggnog freezes well. Freeze some extra during the Christmas season and enjoy a treat during the summer. You can freeze eggnog in 1 cup containers so you can make this in July and think of Christmas. You can double this recipe but not any larger. For a change, try marbling your favorite chocolate quick bread recipe.
